reasons: Slow-fermented sourdough with bite, lightness and flavour.
Wood fire gives speed, smell and theatre.
Mobile units meet people where the city is already alive.
Classic comfort with playful specials people remember.

menu.name: Margherita
menu.ingredients: Tomato sauce, hand-cut fresh fior di latte mozzarella and basil.
menu.label: Classic

menu.name: It's Crust A Matter Of Time

menu.name: He's A Real Funghi

menu.name: To The Moon And Back

menu.name: I've Hit Guac Bottom
